{{CargoClone
|name=Ishtar
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=146
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Demon Minion Skin RUSH +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Demon Minion Skin RUSH +50%
|}}
